mano_cua.result_summary: bodyStyles 和 alternateRowStyles 的 fillColor 颜色交换/反转。bodyStyles 指定蓝色(200,200,255)应用于非交替行，alternateRowStyles 指定粉红色(255,200,200)应用于交替行，但实际 PDF 输出中颜色完全反转：非交替行（Alice/Charlie/Eve）显示粉红色，交替行（Bob/Dave）显示蓝色。当 bodyStyles 包含 lineWidth 时，fillColor 分配逻辑出错。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Generated PDF with bodyStyles.fillColor=[200,200,255] (blue) and alternateRowStyles.fillColor=[255,200,200] (pink). In the output PDF, colors are completely swapped: non-alternate rows (1,3,5) show pink instead of blue, alternate rows (2,4) show blue instead of pink. The lineWidth in bodyStyles causes fillColor assignment logic to reverse.
